name: oh-my-paper
description: Modular Codex skills for an evidence-gated AI-paper workflow from idea to rebuttal.

interface.longDescription: A local-first Codex skill group for planning, writing, figures, layout, reviewer simulation, rebuttal, and eval-driven improvement of AI research papers.
defaultPrompt: Audit this paper draft like a strict reviewer.
Build a rebuttal plan from reviewer comments.
